productDisplayName: Spykar Men Navy Blue V-Neck Innerwear T-shirt
description: Composition Navy blue V-neck inner T-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex, has short sleeves and printed labelling on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not iron on print This tee from spykar is crafted using non-pilling cotton that allows the fabric to contour to your silhouette and help you stretch with ease. Wear this under your shirt or team it with tracks when you're relaxing at home. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
